news.title: Carlsberg and Sapporo Breweries to Form JV in Southeast Asia and Hong Kong
news.summary: Carlsberg will hold a 75% stake, retain full operational control and receive $643 million in cash from Sapporo, which will hold the remainder.

news.title: Carlsberg and Sapporo to form strategic partnership
Carlsberg, Sapporo to team up in SE Asia and UK
news.summary: The brewers have formed a JV for Southeast Asia, while Carlsberg is to produce for Sapporo in the UK.

news.title: Carlsberg moves forward with India IPO process
news.summary: In 2025, the India business delivered “high single-digit percentage growth”.

news.title: World Cup Stock Baskets May Mislead Investors
news.summary: Panmure Liberum says Adidas, Entain and Carlsberg look more attractive on valuation, profitability and growth.

news.title: Panera parent JAB brings new leadership to consumer portfolio
news.summary: The Luxembourg-based investment firm has named two co-heads of business development and portfolio management in New York and London.

news.title: Nestlé, Mondelez join regenerative agriculture framework launch
